2026-02-26PMOOfficial Languages ActAppointment of the Commissioner of Official Languages for CanadaAppointment of Kelly A. Burke of London, Ontario, to be Commissioner of Official Languages for Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of seven years, effective March 30, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Commissioner of Official Languages for Canada
precis: Appointment of Kelly A. Burke of London, Ontario, to be Commissioner of Official Languages for Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of seven years, effective March 30, 2026.
